textByHash.98bb9c66f391c282abd44d29aeac5ca89df76386: [cough] I have received a summons to attend to the Captain and so will be 'down below' for a while.
textByHash.8476bbcc74803086d89eb842ea9c1e6e7738b975: [cough] How is the gas production progressing?
textByHash.18cbf348919e266bd3a90b008a47537f1d04bcb6: [cough] What is it? I can smell your lie, whelp.
textByHash.29f4900bcf4fce434c9d98242b74ca6f160b0512: [cough] Silence! I will not be questioned by underlings!
textByHash.8e684fde0d77c2da553e3ca4ea73a4bd5f5d8b3c: [cough] If you or the others do not consider yourselves capable of carrying out Rabid Jack's orders, then perhaps you need to spend some time in 'The Box'!
textByHash.c788bbcecd20780156afa2fbc2943c590bb5ad74: [cough] Excellent...the gas will leave the brain intact for the next stage.
textByHash.972406798410166b8907372549585241a9c32986: [cough] This time there will be no rebellion amongst the subjects.
textByHash.b8e7d05018968fa242566e24ecea9eb04ee640ea: [cough] Rabid Jack will have his crew of enhanced zombies and I will have as many test subjects as I can vivisect!
textByHash.3ed6bb0887482e1069b2b70ec97187f43a1d4807: [cough] You! I will peel you like a grape for your interference!
textByHash.b361244c4ba7f3b1d0177bade051fd876f292112: [cough] Filthy little insect! Wretched little vermin! Let us see how witty you feel after my barrel-chested bodyguard has beaten you to paste!
textByHash.5227fb0a615c04a3b62019128fd12aeebb8b84fa: [cough] Hekhekhekhek... 'That' is my bodyguard, the Barrelchest!
textByHash.08958d23fc11b97816091858042a1b0fcf8a8872: [cough] I was going to test his capabilities by letting him wipe out the monks, but I believe a little warm up is in order first.
textByHash.afc1272903a8b67274dd50c9cc74cc61292bc6ed: [cough] And now I will take my leave.
